conversation.message_text: True Lemon: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from True Lemon.
True Lemon: Welcome to True Lemon! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/TRZ
True Lemon: Hi this is Trudy, how can I help you?
I need to know if the lemon drink mix is..clear as water..when used. No color ing

True Lemon: Yes, our True Lemon Juice Mix is clear when mixed with water. It doesn't contain any artificial colors or preservatives. You can find more information about it here: https://truecitrus.attn.tv/sl/PtpE_3FI.
In factories they use water bottles but it has to be clear like clear water so it's hard to find mixes that don't add dyes
The pictures I saw online make it look like it's hazy that is why I'm asking directly before I buy any

True Lemon: I understand your concern. Our True Lemon Juice Mix does not contain any artificial colors or dyes, so it should not make your water hazy or colored. However, as it is made from real lemons, it might not be as crystal clear as plain water. It's always a good idea to try a small amount first to see if it meets your requirements.
Well I would like to have just one little packet for I could try it but no one sells one packet it's all 10 packs 100 packs etc so it's a little difficult to just you know get a small amount

True Lemon: I understand your situation. We do offer sample packs on our website which include a variety of our products. This could be a good way for you to try our True Lemon Juice Mix without committing to a larger pack. You can find our sample packs here: https://truecitrus.attn.tv/sl/flPCL4kQ

Just wondering if my order is going through
Template used: "Customer confirms they have a pending charge and no email (edit accordingly) - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 16:58:00.370

Braun: If you didn't get an email confirmation, then it's possible that the order didn't go through. If the charge on your account is pending, the order has not gone through and should either be refunded within 24-48 hours or processed successfully. If the charge reverts, you can place the order again. If the order processes, you'll get a confirmation email soon.

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items
